name: Lime Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker cereal, sugar, and lime zest in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Press the mixture evenly over the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 5 to 6 minutes. Let cool.
4. Beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy. Gradually add the sugar, beating well after each addition.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in lime zest, key lime juice, and vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 45 minutes, or until set.
8. Combine the sour cream and sugar; stir well. Spread evenly over the cheesecake.
9. Bake at 500°F (260°C) for 5 minutes. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack.
10. Chill at least 8 hours before serving. To serve, carefully remove the sides of the springform pan. Garnish with strawberries and lime slices if desired.
Yield: One 9-inch cheesecake.
